y_star: P1 Board 2026-04-21 directive Gemma speed tuning per WebSearch research. CEO research findings in reports/ceo/strategic/gemma_speed_optimization_research_20260421.md (pending). Actionable tuning: 1 set OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL=4 or higher in daemon env (per-agent worker concurrent inference, 10x throughput for 10-agent cluster) 2 OLLAMA_KEEP_ALIVE=-1 keep model resident (avoid per-30min launchd cycle reload cost) 3 reduce per-agent system prompt WHO_I_AM from 2500 chars to ~500 chars focused on Section 2 M Triangle plus Section 5 Iron Rules only (less context = faster gen) 4 model-per-tier routing: e4b (5s) for NREM dream plus commitment scan plus non-critical bg tasks, ystar-gemma (21s) only for CEO decision plus CTO ruling 5 measure before-after latency p50 plus p95 per tier via empirical timing. NOT to do: flash attention (Gemma 4 hybrid attention 50 sliding plus 10 global has dual-dim bug issue 15368, hang risk) plus manual MLX tweak (auto already optimal). Deliverables: a Ethan ruling Y-star-gov reports cto CZL-GEMMA-TUNING-ruling.md b aiden_cluster_daemon patch add OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL plus keep-alive plus tier-model selection c test_aiden_cluster_daemon_tuning.py 3 plus pytest verify tier selection plus prompt length plus env setup d empirical latency benchmark before-after. M-tag M-1 (survival speed) plus M-3 (product story faster response). Owner Ethan implementation per P-12 先查后造 already done via CEO WebSearch. Budget 15 tool uses. No unsafe flags.
